category_sources: Official homepage https://nift.dev/ describes Nift as a cross-platform framework for building the web and website generator.
source_facts.description says Nift is a framework for managing and generating websites.
display_name_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/nifty-site-manager/nsm uses the project name Nift.
docs_sources: Official homepage navigation lists Documentation pages under https://nift.dev/.
https://nift.dev/docs/commands.html is an official Nift documentation page for commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nifty-site-manager/nsm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage says Nift is developed in C++.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools nift and nsm.
